Your property workflow, simplified.
CIP-Spark Application
The Problem
Malaysian property agents run their entire business through WhatsApp, memory, and spreadsheets.
Generic CRMs
Not built for the Malaysian market — no RM pricing logic, no local workflow fit.
Agency tools
Built for agencies to manage teams — not for the independent agent working solo.
Agency-provided software
Where it exists, it's outdated and unhelpful — agents route around it back to WhatsApp.
Renvo — CIP-Spark Application02 / 13
Why Now
A large, underserved market — and no one has built for how agents already work.
30,000+
Registered RENs (Real Estate Negotiators) in Malaysia
WhatsApp is already how deals happen — no tool has embraced this instead of fighting it.
No native mobile-first REN tool exists to automate listing and lead creation directly from WhatsApp.
Renvo — CIP-Spark Application03 / 13

The Solution
Paste a WhatsApp chat, get a structured listing — then manage matching, viewings, and tenancies from your phone.
WhatsApp chat
Owner sends listing details in a normal chat message
AI extraction
Renvo structures it into a full listing automatically
Match tenant
Fits it against tenant needs already on file
Signed tenancy
Track viewings through to a closed deal

Go-to-Market Strategy
Bottom-up, not top-down.
Step 1
Solo agent adoption
Free tier, low friction, co-broking included
Step 2
Usage density builds
Organically within and across agencies
Step 3
Agency upsell
Team Dashboard becomes a natural paid upsell once an agency's own agents are already daily users
Renvo — CIP-Spark Application09 / 13
Business Model
Four tiers, priced for the independent agent.
Free
RM0
Up to 10 active listings.
WhatsApp import included.
Solo
RM29/mo
Unlimited listings. WhatsApp import & AI extraction (listings, tenants, tenancy documents). Manual matching, viewing scheduler, tenancy tracking with expiry reminders.
Most popular
Pro
RM59/mo
Everything in Solo + Active Deals pipeline + Commission Tracker + auto-match alerts + AI-generated portal descriptions + Co-broking Network — split deals with any agent, solo or agency, no team required.
Agency
From RM299/mo
10 seats
Everything in Pro for every seat, plus Agency Team Dashboard — principal visibility across all agents — and sales-assisted onboarding.
Priced below comparable competitor tiers, with WhatsApp-native listing creation available at every tier.
